message:
🐛 Fix skeleton flash on refresh for Security, GitOps, Alerts stat blocks (#201)

StatsOverview was receiving isLoading={isRefreshing} which caused skeleton
loaders to flash briefly during data refresh. These dashboards always have
data from universal stats, so isLoading should be false.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
